## Verses (12)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | I will give you praise and honour, O Lord, because through you I have been lifted up; you have not given my haters cause to be glad over me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | O Lord my God, I sent up my cry to you, and you have made me well. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | O Lord, you have made my soul come again from the underworld: you have given me life and kept me from going down among the dead. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Make songs to the Lord, O you saints of his, and give praise to his holy name. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | For his wrath is only for a minute; in his grace there is life; weeping may be for a night, but joy comes in the morning. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | When things went well for me I said, I will never be moved. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Lord, by your grace you have kept my mountain strong: when your face was turned from me I was troubled. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | My voice went up to you, O Lord; I made my prayer to the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | What profit is there in my blood if I go down into the underworld? will the dust give you praise, or be a witness to your help? | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | Give ear to me, O Lord, and have mercy on me: Lord, be my helper. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | By you my sorrow is turned into dancing; you have taken away my clothing of grief, and given me robes of joy; | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | So that my glory may make songs of praise to you and not be quiet. O Lord my God, I will give you praise for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
